title: King Creole
writer: Herbert Baker, Michael V. Gazzo, Harold Robbins
actors: Elvis Presley, Carolyn Jones, Walter Matthau
plot: A troubled youth's singing sets New Orleans rockin'. With a sweet girl to love him and nightclubbers cheering, it seems he will shake off his past and head for the top. But will a mobster and his man-trap moll snare him in a life ...
